# GitHub Profile Configuration

## Overview
This file contains the configuration for a GitHub profile.

## Settings
- **Profile Name**: Your Name
- **Profile Bio**: Brief introduction about yourself.
- **Profile URL**: [your-profile-link](http://github.com/your-username)

## Skills
- Language 1
- Language 2
- Language 3

## Links
- [Portfolio](http://your-portfolio.com)
- [Blog](http://your-blog.com)

## Additional Information
- Favorite projects: Project 1, Project 2
- Hobbies: Hobbies list

Feel free to customize this template as per your requirements!
